name: Tyropittakia (Cheese Pies)
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Gruyere cheese or cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F/180°C/gas mark 4.
2. Drain the feta cheese of its salty water and crumble into a bowl with a fork or fingers.
3. Add the Gruyere/cottage cheese, eggs, mint, and dill to the feta and mix well.
4. Cut the whole stack of fillo pastry into ¾ long strips about 3 inches wide.
5. Brush each sheet with melted butter.
6. Place a teaspoon of filling at one end (in the corner) on each sheet.
7. Fold over diagonally to cover, ensuring all sides have as many layers as possible to avoid spillage.
8. Place the pies on an oiled baking sheet and brush the tops with butter.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until crisp and light golden. Serve warm; they can be kept in an airtight container for a few days.
Note: Feta cheese is saltier in the UK than in Greece, so additional ingredients are added to balance the flavors.
